draft_picks.match: Houston Rockets vs Los Angeles Lakers
draft_picks.reasoning: Houston (41-26, L10: 5-5) hosts a severely depleted Lakers team. Anthony Davis (OUT — confirmed absence) and D'Angelo Russell (OUT — confirmed absence) are both missing, stripping LA of their two best players. Maxi Kleber also OUT per tonight's report. Per franchise_player_rules, Lakers ML is explicitly prohibited. Houston at home with a strong season record benefits from 2-3pt home court advantage against a shell Lakers roster. Lakers L10 9-1 streak was built with AD and Russell — tonight's lineup is fundamentally different. Houston has playoff seeding motivation (41-26). No advanced stats available (ML-only session). EV = (68/100 × 1.73) - 1 = 1.1764 - 1 = +0.176 (strong edge, EV ≥ 0.15). Confidence 68 satisfies ML floor of 50. Stake at 15% (medium confidence tier, conservative given ML-only session).
